name: Aspect of the End
hintOne: A classic rare sword used by almost every player
hintTwo: Its ability costs 50 mana and moves you forward
definition: A versatile sword that teleports the player 8 blocks ahead and grants a temporary speed boost

name: Aote
hintOne: The common abbreviation for a famous teleporting sword
hintTwo: Players often use it with the Ultimate Wise enchantment
definition: Short for Aspect of the End, the most used utility weapon for mobility in Skyblock

name: Arachne
hintOne: A boss found in a deep, web-filled sanctuary
hintTwo: You need a special calling item to summon her
definition: A powerful spider boss located in the Spider's Den that drops Soulflow and equipment

name: Artifact of Power
hintOne: A legendary accessory that can hold many gemstones
hintTwo: It is an upgraded version of a rare talisman from the Crystal Hollows
definition: A powerful accessory that provides massive stat bonuses depending on the gemstones applied to its slots

name: Atomsplit Katana
hintOne: The final upgrade of a specific slayer weapon line
hintTwo: It is designed specifically to kill Tier 4 Voidgloom Seraphs
definition: The most powerful Enderman Slayer weapon, dealing massive damage to Enderman mobs

name: Aurora Armor
hintOne: A mage-class armor set obtained from the Kuudra fight
hintTwo: It has different 'attributes' that can be upgraded
definition: A high-end magic armor set from the Crimson Isle that scales its damage based on mana

name: Auto Recombobulator
hintOne: A legendary dungeon accessory
hintTwo: It has a 1% chance to trigger when killing a mob
definition: A talisman that automatically upgrades the rarity of a dropped item if the chance is met

name: Axe of the Shredded
hintOne: A powerful weapon requiring Zombie Slayer Level 8
hintTwo: You can throw it to deal massive damage from a distance
definition: The ultimate zombie slayer weapon that consumes mana to throw axes at enemies

name: Backpack
hintOne: A storage item that was once disabled for a long time
hintTwo: You can access its contents directly from your inventory
definition: A portable container used to expand the player's inventory space, available in different sizes

name: Bazaar
hintOne: The main hub for trading bulk commodities
hintTwo: Prices here change constantly based on supply and demand
definition: An NPC-driven marketplace where players buy and sell resources like crops, ores, and mob drops

name: Beastmaster Crest
hintOne: An accessory related to Diana's mythological ritual
hintTwo: It gains more stats as you kill more mythological creatures
definition: A talisman that tracks your kills during the Diana event and rewards you with better stats

name: Bingo Card
hintOne: An item given to players during a special monthly event
hintTwo: You must complete various tasks to fill its slots
definition: An item used during the Bingo event to track progress and earn Bingo points for rewards

name: Bits
hintOne: A currency earned while having a Booster Cookie active
hintTwo: You can spend them at Elizabeth's shop in the Hub
definition: A special currency used to buy utility items like God Potions, Katana upgrades, and more

name: Black Cat
hintOne: A speed-oriented pet purchased during the Spooky Festival
hintTwo: It increases your maximum speed cap
definition: A legendary pet that boosts Magic Find and allows players to exceed the 400 speed limit

name: Blaze Pet
hintOne: A combat pet that is essential for the Nether
hintTwo: It doubles the stats of Frozen Blaze armor
definition: A high-tier pet that provides fire immunity and massive stat buffs when wearing the Frozen Blaze set

name: Blood God Crest
hintOne: A limited-time accessory from a specific Technoblade event
hintTwo: It grants bonus stats for every millions of players' kills
definition: A rare talisman released in memory of Technoblade that provides health and strength

name: Blue Cheese Goblin Omelette
hintOne: The most expensive upgrade for a Drill
hintTwo: It grants a massive boost to Mining Speed for a short time
definition: An ultra-rare drill part that allows players to use the 'Pickobulus' ability more effectively

name: Booster Cookie
hintOne: The most important consumable for active players
hintTwo: It prevents loss of coins on death and allows /bz access
definition: An item that grants 'Cookie Buff' for 4 days, providing bits, skill XP boosts, and many quality-of-life features

name: Builders Ruler
hintOne: A tool used to build massive farms on the Garden or Island
hintTwo: It can place a whole row of blocks at once
definition: A utility item purchased from Anita that allows players to build structures extremely fast

name: Burning Kuudra
hintOne: The third tier of the giant lava boss fight
hintTwo: It requires a specific party setup to defeat efficiently
definition: A difficult version of the Kuudra boss fight in the Crimson Isle that rewards high-tier armor and loot

name: Campfire Cultist
hintOne: An NPC found in a dark forest area
hintTwo: He gives you a talisman that upgrades as you survive longer in fire
definition: An NPC in the Birch Park who challenges players to stand in a campfire to upgrade their Wood Affinity Talisman

name: Catacombs
hintOne: The primary location for the Dungeon sub-game
hintTwo: It features seven floors, each harder than the last
definition: The main dungeon area where players fight undead mobs and bosses like Bonzo, Scarf, and Necron

name: Celestial Cufflinks
hintOne: An accessory related to the Sun and Moon
hintTwo: It is crafted using items from the Chocolate Factory
definition: A rare accessory that provides different stat boosts depending on the time of day in Skyblock

name: Chimera
hintOne: An incredibly expensive Ultimate Enchantment
hintTwo: It copies a percentage of your active pet's stats
definition: A top-tier enchantment dropped by Inquisitors during the Diana event that scales with your pet

name: Chocolate Factory
hintOne: A clicker-style minigame added to the Hub
hintTwo: You spend currency on rabbits to increase production
definition: A feature located in the Community Center where players produce chocolate to buy unique accessories

name: Clay Minion
hintOne: A minion formerly famous for making pure coins
hintTwo: It was the meta for fishing XP and money for a long time
definition: A resource-generating minion that produces clay, often used by early-game players to level up Fishing

name: Cocoa Chopper
hintOne: An axe specifically designed for a brown crop
hintTwo: It has a chance to drop Replenish-style rewards
definition: A specialized tool for farming cocoa beans that grants bonus farming fortune

name: Collector Museum
hintOne: A place where you donate items to increase your rank
hintTwo: Donating items binds them to your soul
definition: A location in the Hub where players can display their gear to earn rewards and Skyblock XP

name: Composter
hintOne: A machine found in the Garden
hintTwo: It turns unwanted crops into Organic Matter and Fuel
definition: A station used to produce Compost, which is necessary for upgrading Garden plots

name: Corrupt Soil
hintOne: A popular minion upgrade for combat minions
hintTwo: It makes mobs drop Corrupted Fragments and Sulfur
definition: A minion fuel upgrade that maximizes profit by forcing mobs to drop extra corrupted items

name: Crimson Isle
hintOne: The high-level combat island that replaced the Blazing Fortress
hintTwo: It features two factions: Mage and Barbarian
definition: The end-game Nether dimension where players fight Kuudra and collect specialized armor sets

name: Crystal Hollows
hintOne: A massive underground mining area
hintTwo: The map resets every few hours and has different biomes
definition: A randomized mining zone where players search for crystals and gemstones like Ruby and Jasper

name: Daedalus Axe
hintOne: A legendary weapon that copies your pet's stats
hintTwo: It is a key item for the Mythological Ritual event
definition: A high-end axe that gains strength based on your active pet and increases Magic Find

name: Dark Auction
hintOne: A secret event that happens every 3 Skyblock days
hintTwo: You need a lot of coins to even enter the room
definition: A hidden auction house hosted by Sirius where rare items like Midas Spoon and Flower of Truth are sold

name: Deathripper Dagger
hintOne: A slayer weapon used for Spider Slayer
hintTwo: It is an upgrade from the Scorpion Foil
definition: A powerful dagger designed specifically to deal massive damage to spiders and bosses like Arachne

name: Derpy
hintOne: A mayor who closes the Auction House
hintTwo: He doubles mob health but boosts skill XP by 50%
definition: A special mayor known for chaotic effects, making the game harder but rewarding players with more XP

name: Diana
hintOne: A mayor who starts the Mythological Ritual
hintTwo: She enables the use of the Ancestral Spade to find burrows
definition: A mayor that introduces Griffin pets and mythical creatures to the Hub island

name: Diamond Atom
hintOne: A rare drop from a specific floor in the Catacombs
hintTwo: It is used to apply the 'Perfect' reforge to armor
definition: A reforge stone dropped in Master Mode dungeons that provides huge defense bonuses

name: Divan's Drill
hintOne: The most expensive and powerful mining tool in the game
hintTwo: It is crafted using multiple Alloys and other drills
definition: The ultimate mining tool, often costing billions of coins, used for the fastest gemstone mining

name: Dreadlord Sword
hintOne: A very common mage weapon from the early floors of dungeons
hintTwo: It shoots skulls that deal area-of-effect damage
definition: A budget mage weapon dropped by mobs in the Catacombs, popular for clearing weak groups of enemies
